name: PolarityTE, Inc.
description: PolarityTE, Inc. (now operating as PolarityBio) is a biotechnology company focused on the field of regenerative medicine and tissue engineering. The company is dedicated to developing innovative regenerative tissue products, most notably SkinTE®, an investigational autologous cutaneous multicellular therapy designed to initiate the wound healing process for chronic wounds and diabetic foot ulcers. Headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah, the firm conducts clinical research and development to advance its pipeline of regenerative biologics, aiming to provide new therapeutic options for patients requiring reconstructive applications and advanced wound care solutions.
